comment.body:
cboe first,
and read Taleb's book first,
for a speed profile that I make, you need to be able to build vanna model too, using the least approximations possible, but for intraday, doesn't necessary.
I use it for predictive edge: zomma and color, and so you can derive how speed will change over time.

comment.body: I am not a service lol. I am an Italian lawyer and financial advisor (the latter since one month) with the passion for maths since I was young (I could not study it academically because I was diverted by family to studying law) and into trading since 10 years. I work wirh my best friend who is a electric engeneer PhD. We do our trading with prop firms in eurusd teti g to accumulate some capital over time, which is not easy Heehhehe. We have our main jobs and we do not provide any service, we have zero intention to do so nor would have the ability and time. So, for what matters, I officially declare I am not a spy. We just try to understand the market from new perspectives every year a bit more 😃☺️🙏🍀
